results.rendered_html:
sthiratā (von sthira) f.
1〉 Härte: mṛdūnām  SUŚR. 1,117,17 . 239,8 . 2,166,9 .
— 2〉 Bestand, Beständigkeit, Dauerhaftigkeit: kamalāmu  Spr. (II) 5902 . svācāra˚ 6587 . saṃpadām 6702 . 6768 . bhaṅgure 'sminbhave kasya sthiratā  KATHĀS. 111,58 .  SĀH. D. 63,20 . sthiratāmupayan 243 . nī  PAÑCAT. 97,14 . Standhaftigkeit, Fassung: sthiratāmupetya sich fassend  MBH. 3,14748 . bāṣpaṃ kuru sthiratayā viratānubandham  ŚĀK. 90 .

results.rendered_html:
sthiratā -tvaṃ
1 Firmness, steadiness, stability.
2 Firm or vigorous effort, fortitude;  Ś. 4. 14. 
3 Constancy, firmness of mind.
4 Fixity.
5 Fearlessness.
